---
title: "P00 | Nested Loop HTML Report"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(ggplot2)
library(rmdreportdeck)

pairs <- c("CIP vs SST", "E vs CIN")
cell_types <- c("Total", "Naive CD4 T cells (I)")
plot_types <- c("GO ORA barplot", "GO ORA dotplot")
```

# Goal

This example exercises nested `report_loop_section()` blocks for both repeated cell-type panels and repeated plot-type panels.

```{r results='asis', echo=FALSE}
for (pair_idx in seq_along(pairs)) {
  pair <- pairs[[pair_idx]]
  cat(paste0("\n# ", pair, "\n\n"))

  cell_items <- vector("list", length(cell_types))

  for (ct_idx in seq_along(cell_types)) {
    ct <- cell_types[[ct_idx]]
    plot_items <- vector("list", length(plot_types))

    for (plot_idx in seq_along(plot_types)) {
      plot_type <- plot_types[[plot_idx]]
      df <- data.frame(
        sample = c("A", "B"),
        value = c(plot_idx + ct_idx, plot_idx + pair_idx + 1)
      )
      plot_obj <- ggplot(df, aes(sample, value, fill = sample)) +
        geom_col(show.legend = FALSE)

      plot_items[[plot_idx]] <- report_item_panel(
        title = plot_type,
        id = paste("plot", pair_idx, ct_idx, plot_idx, sep = "-"),
        asset_bar = report_asset_bar(
          "Downloads",
          report_download_link(
            "Download TSV",
            paste0("smoke-", pair_idx, "-", ct_idx, "-", plot_idx, ".tsv"),
            report_text_data_uri("metric\tvalue\nsignal\t1\n")
          )
        ),
        note = "Innermost loop item",
        report_item_plot(plot_obj, width = 4, height = 3)
      )
    }

    cell_items[[ct_idx]] <- report_item_panel(
      title = ct,
      id = paste("cell", pair_idx, ct_idx, sep = "-"),
      note = "Second-level loop item",
      report_loop_section(
        plot_items,
        open_first = FALSE,
        max_open = 999L,
        level = 3L
      )
    )
  }

  cat(as.character(report_loop_section(
    cell_items,
    open_first = FALSE,
    max_open = 999L,
    level = 2L
  )))
  cat("\n")
}
```
